name: Olive Garden Shrimp Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Knorr Romaglio Pasta, Sauce Mix (or similar)
1 lb Medium shrimp, cooked, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 3-quart pan over medium heat. Add the remaining sauce ingredients. Stir well and simmer for 10 minutes.
2. In a large sauté pan, melt 2 tablespoons butter. Sauté vegetables about 3 minutes until crisp-tender. Add to the sauce and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
3. When the pasta is almost done, stir the shrimp into the sauce to heat through. Do not boil.
4. Spoon Shrimp Primavera sauce over hot linguini. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
